top_tweets.text:
One reason AI sucks at design is because you're bad at telling it what you want

Experienced designers have a thousand shorthands for expressing design in words:

- "set the text tighter/looser", "bump the leading"
- "tighten it up", "let it breathe", "fix the hierarchy"
-
top_tweets.author: mattpocockuk
top_tweets.name: Matt Pocock
top_tweets.summary_zh: AI 在設計上表現不佳的原因之一，是使用者不懂如何用設計師的專業語彙表達需求。經驗豐富的設計師會用「收緊／放鬆字距」「調整行距」「修正層級」等簡寫詞彙，這些細膩的溝通語言是 AI 難以理解的關鍵。

top_tweets.text:
You can now turn any GitHub repo into a registry.

Drop in a registry.json. Define your items. Install with the CLI.

Distribute components, utilities, config, docs, rules, design systems, workflows, agents, skills and more. https://t.co/5Axczq6RGC
top_tweets.author: shadcn
top_tweets.name: shadcn
top_tweets.summary_zh: shadcn 宣布可將任何 GitHub repo 變成 registry，只需放入 registry.json 定義項目，即可透過 CLI 安裝。適用於分發元件、工具、設計系統、工作流程等多種資源。

top_tweets.author: gabriell_lab
top_tweets.name: Gabriel
top_tweets.summary_zh: 設計工程建議：考慮讓 textarea 隨內容自動增長，而非引入巢狀捲軸，能提供更流暢的書寫體驗並讓表單更易掃視。CSS 使用 field-sizing: content 即可實現。

top_tweets.text:
NVIDIA announces the first open humanoid robot reference design built for robotics research.

The NVIDIA Isaac GR00T Reference Humanoid Robot combines the @UnitreeRobotics H2 humanoid robot, @SharpaRobotics Wave five-fingered hands for dexterous manipulation, Jetson Thor onboard https://t.co/iQU6n8EIOs
top_tweets.author: NVIDIARobotics
top_tweets.name: NVIDIA Robotics
top_tweets.summary_zh: NVIDIA 發布首款開放人形機器人參考設計，專為機器人研究打造。整合 Unitree H2 人形機器人、Sharpa Wave 五指靈巧手與 Jetson Thor 晶片，代號 Isaac GR00T。

top_tweets.text:
I love seeing creatives redesign iconic local brands. This Gala concept is sleek, modern, and visually clean.

​But as a brand strategist, before i am a designer, looking at the new design highlights a massive trap

I will break it down. 🧵
top_tweets.author: Hiadenike
top_tweets.name: Adenike
top_tweets.summary_zh: 創意人重新設計知名在地品牌 Gala 的概念雖然視覺俐落現代，但身為品牌策略師作者指出這揭示了設計師常見的陷阱。強調品牌策略應先於設計執行。

top_tweets.text:
If you want to know what giveaway LLM design is, this is it: thin colored borders, gradients, glow effects, too many different font sizes, small fonts too small, inconsistent padding and alignment (especially vertical). 

Not a dunk on @zeeg he’s being transparent about it. And
top_tweets.author: mitchellh
top_tweets.name: Mitchell Hashimoto
top_tweets.summary_zh: 指出 LLM 生成設計的典型特徵：細彩色邊框、漸層、發光效果、過多字級變化、小字過小、間距與對齊不一致（尤其是垂直方向）。作者以實例說明 AI 設計的可辨識缺陷。

top_tweets.text:
Microsoft says it'll replace the ancient Windows 11 dialog box with a modern rewrite (WinUI) in a major design update.

Microsoft confirmed that the company is working through older Windows dialogs and rewriting them in WinUI 3. The file copy dialog is already done internally, https://t.co/7eVAUWxPFm
top_tweets.author: WindowsLatest
top_tweets.name: Windows Latest
top_tweets.summary_zh: 微軟確認將在重大設計更新中，以 WinUI 3 改寫 Windows 11 老舊對話框。檔案複製對話框已在內部完成重寫，逐步汰換古老 UI 元件。

top_tweets.text:
hey, @UseCorgi 

i have zero problems with your ceo working 7 days a week, it is up to him, but as a designer i can't stand bad design. 

long story short - i fixed your logo. 

now it's your turn. 

if you need i can send you svg. just use it. https://t.co/ludjqNHqqT
top_tweets.author: danywander
top_tweets.name: dany
top_tweets.summary_zh: 設計師公開向 @UseCorgi 提出 logo 改善建議，表示無法容忍糟糕設計，並主動提供修正版本與 SVG 檔案供品牌採用。

top_tweets.text:
The second photo is from a "stunning" and "beautifully presented" new apartment building in London.

Backrooms (and similar films/shows like Severance) prove that the way we design most interiors is genuinely frightening and bad for our psychological health.

Grey carpets, grey https://t.co/4vptOp2CDa
top_tweets.author: culturaltutor
top_tweets.name: The Cultural Tutor
top_tweets.summary_zh: 以倫敦新公寓大樓與《Backrooms》《Severance》等影視作品為例，指出當代室內設計（如灰色地毯、灰色調）令人感到恐懼且有害心理健康，反映主流設計方向的問題。

top_tweets.text: Character design gets way better when you stop thinking “outfit” and start thinking silhouette https://t.co/wqb1tUGgEw
top_tweets.author: designatmo
top_tweets.name: ATMO
top_tweets.summary_zh: 角色設計的關鍵思維轉變：停止思考「服裝」，改從「剪影」出發，能大幅提升設計品質。

criteria.score_formula: likes（主要）+ Claude 人工過濾廣告/招聘/meme/非設計
claude_filter_rules: 排除純廣告、招聘文（有洞見的 JD 除外）
排除與產品設計/PM 無關（crypto、體育、政治等）
排除 meme/搞笑但無內容
偏好有觀點的原創內容

top_products.title: Stella
top_products.author: Senan Gaffori
top_products.tagline: Local natural language search across all your files
top_products.summary_zh: 本地自然語言搜尋工具，可搜尋電腦中所有檔案內容。適合需要快速查找本地文件的使用者。

top_products.title: Skylive
top_products.author: Samuel Angel Gallo Ocampo
top_products.tagline: Never miss a celestial event, anywhere on Earth
top_products.summary_zh: 天文事件提醒服務，協助使用者追蹤全球各地的天象活動，避免錯過重要天文現象。

top_products.title: Mistral Vibe
top_products.author: Zac Zuo
top_products.tagline: I agent for long-running, multi-step work and coding
top_products.summary_zh: AI 代理工具，專為長時間、多步驟的工作流程與程式開發任務設計。

top_products.title: Tokenwise
top_products.author: Théophile Louvart
top_products.tagline: A smart LLM proxy that shows where you're overpaying
top_products.summary_zh: 智慧型 LLM proxy 服務，分析並顯示 API 使用中的超額付費項目，協助優化成本。

top_products.title: Paint By JSON | Figma API Client
top_products.author: Rob McLoughlin
top_products.tagline: Real API data in your mockups made as easy as lorem ipsum.
top_products.summary_zh: Figma 外掛工具，讓設計師可在介面設計稿中直接插入真實 API 資料，簡化原型製作流程。

top_products.title: R0Y OMNI 1.0
top_products.author: Bryan Liu
top_products.tagline: Generate more accurate investment dashboards and reports
top_products.summary_zh: 投資分析工具，用於生成更精確的投資儀表板與報告，協助投資決策。
